entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop used as a source of vegetable oil, protein, minerals, and vitamins.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where peanut is widely cultivated.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where peanut is widely cultivated.

entities.name: AMERICA
entities.description: A continent where peanut is widely cultivated.

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The largest producer and consumer of peanut.

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The process of altering the DNA makeup of an organism.

entities.name: TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of introducing foreign DNA into a cell or organism.

entities.name: SCREENING EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness of identifying transgenic organisms among a population.

entities.name: DSRED2
entities.description: A red fluorescence protein used as a visual reporter gene to improve screening efficiency.

entities.name: REPORTER GENE
entities.description: A gene that researchers use to indicate whether a specific genetic modification has occurred.

entities.name: PROTOPLASTS
entities.description: Plant cells with the cell wall removed, used for genetic transformation.

entities.name: ZHONHUA 12
entities.description: A specific cultivar of peanut used in the study.

entities.name: PEG
entities.description: Polyethylene glycol, used for the transformation of protoplasts.

entities.name: RED FLUORESCENCE
entities.description: The visual phenotype produced by the expression of the DsRed2 protein.

entities.name: 35S PROMOTER
entities.description: A strong constitutive promoter used to drive the expression of the DsRed2 gene.

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM TUMEFACIENS-MEDIATED TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A method of genetic transformation using Agrobacterium tumefaciens.

entities.name: ZHONGHUA 24
entities.description: A peanut cultivar used as a parent for crossing in the study.

entities.name: HYBRID PLANT IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying hybrid offspring resulting from a cross between two parents.

entities.name: HAIRY ROOTS
entities.description: Roots induced by Agrobacterium rhizogenes, used for genetic transformation.

entities.name: HUAYU 23
entities.description: A peanut cultivar used for hairy root transformation.

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM RHIZOGENES-MEDIATED TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A method of genetic transformation using Agrobacterium rhizogenes to induce hairy roots.
